title: Calculate Special Bonus
description: Calculate bonus for each employee: bonus = salary if employee_id is odd AND name doesn't start with 'M', else 0.
constraints: employee_id is the primary key and is a positive integer
key_concept: CASE WHEN for conditional columns. Modulo (%) for odd/even check. String functions: LIKE.

hints.L1: Use CASE WHEN to return salary or 0 based on two conditions joined by AND.
hints.L2: CASE WHEN employee_id % 2 = 1 AND name NOT LIKE 'M%' THEN salary ELSE 0 END
hints.L3: SELECT employee_id, CASE WHEN employee_id % 2 <> 0 AND name NOT LIKE 'M%' THEN salary ELSE 0 END AS bonus FROM Employees ORDER BY employee_id

optimal_solution:
SELECT employee_id,
  CASE WHEN employee_id % 2 <> 0 AND name NOT LIKE 'M%' THEN salary ELSE 0 END AS bonus
FROM Employees
ORDER BY employee_id;
